data.title: Bill Corl of Omega Labs joins Cannabix Tech Board of Directors. They've partnered since May 2024 for MBT tech.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on August 7, 2025, Cannabix Technologies Inc. (CSE: BLO) (OTC PINK: BLOZF) (Frankfurt: 8CT) announced the appointment of William (Bill) R. Corl to its board of directors. Corl serves as the Chief Executive Officer for Omega Laboratories, Inc., a global leader in advanced specimen drug testing. Since May 2024, Omega and Cannabix have collaborated under a strategic partnership to progress the commercialization of the Company’s Marijuana Breath Test (MBT) technology.
NextNRG sees 236% revenue jump in July 2025 compared to last year.

data.title: IQST and Cycurion sign MOU for equity exchange to build next-gen AI powerhouse, investing millions in Proprietary AI assets and technologies.
data.description: In the past five years, a significant investment totaling millions of dollars has been made by both companies into developing and acquiring their own AI assets and technologies.

Ukraine’s President, Volodymyr Zelenskyy has weighed in on the meeting between Russia’s President Vladimir Putin and U.S. President Donald Trump’s envoy Steve Witkoff. After speaking with Trump, Zelenskyy says ‘it appears that Russia is now more inclined to a ceasefire’ while

data.title: AFicioNAdo™ launches AFNA Wine Certified™ program for non-alcoholic drinks. Empowers industry professionals. (Characters: 93)
data.description: Top Online Course for Retail and Restaurant Workers Launched in NYC on Aug. 7, 2025. AFicioNAdo™ unveiled as the premier certification program focusing on non-alcoholic adult drinks. The course aims to educate industry professionals on alcohol-free options.

data.title: Skydance Media and Paramount Global merge, with investment from Ellison Family and RedBird. Visit Paramount.com for details.
data.description: The Ellison Family and RedBird Capital recently announced a significant long-term strategic investment to revitalize the entertainment company David Ellison. This partnership is aimed at boosting the presence of David Ellison in the industry. The official announcement can be found at www.Paramount.com/news. The collaboration was made public in Los Angeles and New York on August 7, 2025. Skydance Media and Paramount Global confirmed this joint endeavor, marking a new chapter for David Ellison's future.

data.title: B. Riley Securities Holdings, Inc. gives post-carve out business update, with financial info for first full quarter.
data.description: In a recent announcement on August 7, 2025, B. Riley Securities Holdings, Inc. (referred to as "B. Riley Securities," "BRS," or the "Company"), a prominent middle market investment bank headquartered in Arlington, Virginia, shared a business update along with preliminary financial figures for its inaugural full quarter following the most recent period.

data.title: Trump signs new executive order on homelessness, as Robert Craig Films spotlights crisis, offering solutions.
data.description: Robert Craig Films is bringing attention to America's homelessness crisis by showcasing real solutions. This comes as President Trump signs a new executive order on August 7, 2025, targeting homelessness. The film company aims to humanize the issue, highlighting the increasing number of homeless individuals in the country. Through their work, they are shedding light on the struggles faced by those without shelter. The focus is on providing viable solutions to this pressing problem, as the issue continues to affect a significant portion of the population nationwide.

data.title: VOW closes seed round led by KB Partners, aiming to revolutionize live events with AI. New York, Aug 7, 2025.
data.description: A cutting-edge AI-driven operating system aimed at enhancing event and guest management has revealed successful fundraising from top investors in media, entertainment, sports, and consumer innovation sectors. The groundbreaking development took place in New York on August 7, 2025. The AI-enhanced operating system, known as VOW, is set to revolutionize the sector with its innovative approach.

data.title: POP Culture and Ciwen Media form strategic partnership in Chinese Wave entertainment sector. Aug. 7, 2025, Xiamen.
data.description: In Xiamen, China on August 7, 2025, POP Culture and Ciwen Media announced a new strategic partnership. This collaboration signifies a major advancement for POP Culture as it strengthens its presence in the Chinese Wave (Huáliú) culture and broadens its reach. The cooperation aims to capitalize on the growing trend and reach a wider audience.

data.title: Renowned defense attorney Robert Simels launches podcast "Injustice for All" exposing legal system, with a .900 trial win rate.
data.description: In New York on August 7, 2025, Robert Simels, a well-known criminal defense attorney with an impressive federal trial success rate, has launched a new podcast called "Injustice for All." Simels, who achieved a stellar .900 batting average in trials, is shedding light on flaws within the American legal system. His podcast aims to raise awareness on the issue and has already gained traction among listeners.

data.title: Sages & Scientists Symposium 2025 in Singer Island, FL on Dec 5-7, with theme "Where Technology Evolves and Humanity Awakens", hosted by Deepak Chopra, MD and Poonacha Machaiah.
data.description: In Singer Island, Florida, from December 5 to 7, 2025, the Sages & Scientists Symposium will be held with the theme "Where Technology Evolves and Humanity Awakens." Co-hosted by Deepak Chopra, MD, and Poonacha Machaiah, this annual event is set to bring together experts and innovators for a transformative discourse.

data.title: Tegoprazan in GERD shows positive 24-week results in Phase 3 trial vs lansoprazole 15mg; superior healing maintenance.
data.description: In a recent study, Tegoprazan showed statistically significant effectiveness in maintaining the healing of erosive esophagitis (EE) in all patients, including those in all grades (LA Grades A–D) and the most severe cases (LA Grades C/D), when compared to lansoprazole 15mg. The safe and tolerable profile of Tegoprazan remained consistent with that of lansoprazole.

data.title: PMV Pharma reports Q2 2025 financial results with focus on small molecule therapies targeting p53. Nasdaq: PMVP.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, PMV Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Princeton, New Jersey, announced its financial performance for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025. PMV Pharma, listed on Nasdaq as PMVP, specializes in precision oncology and focuses on creating small molecule therapies that target p53 across various types of tumors. The company shared its corporate update alongside revealing the financial results.

data.title: PHINIA releases 2024 Sustainability Report, highlighting progress in environmental, social, and governance priorities. #NYSE #premiumfuel #sustainability
data.description: PHINIA Inc. (NYSE: PHIN), a top player in premium fuel and electrical systems as well as aftermarket solutions, unveiled its 2024 Sustainability Report in Auburn Hills, Mich. The report showcases the company's advancements in environmental, social, and governance areas throughout the year. This marks the second year of the report, highlighting PHINIA's ongoing commitment to sustainable practices, circular economy initiatives, inclusivity, and employee welfare. The document outlines the company's progress in these key areas and its dedication to innovation for a better tomorrow.

data.title: Hertz sees best quarterly results in nearly two years with a $0.5 billion profit boost from improved EBITDA and net income.
data.description: Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ) shared its second quarter 2025 results today. In this quarter, both net income and Adjusted Corporate EBITDA saw an approximately $0.5 billion improvement compared to the previous year. This marks the Company's initial quarter of achieving positive Adjusted Corporate EBITDA in almost two years. The positive results were attributed to the Company's strategic fleet management, efficient operations, and strict cost control measures. The Company's approach termed as "Buy Right, Hold Right, Se" has contributed to this success.
The Ukrainian unmanned boat was destroyed by the Black Sea Fleet forces in the waters of the Black Sea, the Russian Ministry of Defense reported

data.title: indie Semi (Nasdaq: INDI) to acquire emotion3D for in-cabin sensing & ADAS. McKinsey projects $83B market value by 2030.
data.description: Indie Semiconductor, a leader in automotive solutions, has recently revealed its acquisition of emotion3D GmbH, a prominent developer based in Vienna, Austria, specializing in cutting-edge perception algorithms and software for in-cabin sensing, ADAS, and automated driving. This strategic move comes as the automotive software sector is forecasted to reach a significant market value of $83 billion by 2030, as per McKinsey. The deal signifies indie Semiconductor's commitment to expanding its capabilities and position in the rapidly evolving automotive technology landscape.
PharmaCorp buys pharmacy in Western Canada, expanding its reach.

data.title: Stella Foundation's 2025 Women's Fast Pitch has 6 semifinalists competing for $50K+ in prizes at Women's Venture Summit.
data.description: Six startups founded and led by women will be participating in the live competition at the Women's Venture Summit 2025 in San Diego. The event is set to take place on August 7, 2025. The Stella Foundation revealed the selected semifinalists for its 12th Annual Women's Fast Pitch competition. The participants will be vying for prizes totaling over $50,000. This national pitch competition aims to highlight innovative women entrepreneurs and their visionary ideas.
